title: lateinit Property in Kotlin
summary: There can be two ways to declare and initialize a var property var variable : CustomClass = CustomClass() or var variable : CustomClass? = null (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({}); The first property is initialized while declaration itself and doesn’t require a null check (?.) while using it.
content:
There can be two ways to declare and initialize a var property

var variable : CustomClass = CustomClass() 
 or
var variable : CustomClass? = null

The first property is initialized while declaration itself and doesn’t require a null check (?.) while using it.
